description:
Create the compiler2-native interface substrate. Replace `ModuleSurface` and `ModuleExport` with a split module-owned model under `ModuleMap`: definition-side state for local scoping readiness, and interface-side state for exported callable visibility. Add `FactKey::ModuleInterface(ModuleId)`, make interface entries `FunctionId`-backed with callable-kind/variadic metadata, and provide intentful `ModuleInterface` query methods (`public_function_with_name_arity`, `macro_with_name_arity`, `exported_functions`, `exported_macros`).

Keep exact lookup and set selection distinct: exact lookup records obligations lazily; set selection returns `Ready|Pending` and takes an optional `except` filter.

Signal: compiler2 has one authoritative callable-interface payload shape, `ModuleSurface` is gone as a concept, and callers can express intent without open-coding export filtering.
title: Compiler2 interface substrate: replace ModuleSurface/ModuleExport with module-owned callable interface state
